title: お出かけ後のお楽しみ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home from an outing with
Maruzensky...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Time really does fly when you're having fun... I'm
not ready for the day to end!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, you too, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, you too, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
In that case... Since we're already out and about,
let's take a little detour!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's kind of boring just to go straight home, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Woo-hoo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Can I decide where we go? There's something I've
been wanting to try for a while now!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Follow me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Radical! They're still open!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I've always wanted to go to an amusement park in
the evening!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky's goal is to visit just before closing
time, when the park is almost empty.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's got that after-hours vibe. Hip, young people
like to come at this time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It'll be easier to get around with so few people.
That means we can enjoy lots of rides!
choice_data_list: Is entering just before closing time really okay?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: No problemo! That's where you come in, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: No problemo! That's where you come in, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So, what kind of strategy do you think we should
follow to have the most fun possible with our
limited time?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, and I definitely want to ride the roller
coaster!
choice_data_list: Let's just go straight to the roller coaster!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wh-whaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: That plan... is the bomb!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
By focusing on just one thing, we'll get the most
enjoyment out of our time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I heard the roller coaster here is the fastest in the
country, so it's perfect for this plan!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you didn't know? Well, I'm sure it'll be like a
walk in the park for you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're used to my driving, so this'll be
nothing—probably!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're used to my driving, so this'll be
nothing—probably!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now come on, before you change your mind!
We're wasting time!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's go, go, GO! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We ride the roller coaster, and while I certainly
feel like I've developed a tolerance for high
speeds...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, are you okay? Can you stand up? Do you
need me to carry you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, are you okay? Can you stand up? Do you
need me to carry you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't have pushed yourself so hard! Let's
take a rest on one of the benches over there and
then head home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us take some time to admire the
amusement park as the remaining visitors
continue to dissipate.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: A simple and straightforward strategy! I like it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's going to be a test of stamina to see how much
we can do...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I want to conquer all the rides! It may be a pretty rough road, though. Are you ready for that?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I love that energy! That's what I want to
hear, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I love that energy! That's what I want to
hear, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All right, let's do this! Chaaarge!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, we're halfway there! Now for the final
sprint!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hang in there, Trainer! Let's get through this
together!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hang in there, Trainer! Let's get through this
together!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We can do it! We're going to become amusement
park legends!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky and I keep up the pace, rushing
around the whole park... and somehow manage to
ride all of the rides!
